ranges.notes: Cold winter weather with temperatures often below freezing; very low tourist crowds after New Year’s. Quiet city atmosphere but limited outdoor activities.
Still cold and often damp with short daylight hours; museums and indoor attractions are good options. Low crowds but less vibrant atmosphere.
Mid-January sees slightly more stable weather; indoor cultural visits such as Würzburg Residence tours recommended. Crowds remain low, good for budget travelers.
Late January can be cold but some days are crisp and sunny; good time for exploring wine cellars and local indoor gastronomy. Low crowds and off-season prices.
Winter persists with cold temps but often sunny days; good for wine tasting and visiting museums. Crowds remain low to moderate.
Carnival season brings lively parades and local festivities with increased crowds and vibrant atmosphere. Weather still cold but festivities warm the experience.
Post-carnival quieter days with cold weather; museums and wineries remain a draw. Good for budget travelers and those seeking fewer crowds.
End of February can feel more like early spring with occasional mild days, good for wine region excursions. Still low tourist density.
Early March is transitional; weather can be chilly but days lengthen. Good for indoor and some outdoor sightseeing with fewer tourists.
Local spring festivals celebrate the season with outdoor events, mild weather starts to appear, making it a pleasant time to visit.
Mid-March brings milder temperatures and blooming parks; ideal for walking tours and river cruises before the peak season.
Late March sees spring in full swing with pleasant weather and increasing daylight; outdoor cafes and vineyards open up, attracting more visitors.
Early April can be rainy but temperatures rise; ideal for enjoying spring blooms and open-air wine tastings. Moderate crowds start to build.
Easter brings religious events, traditional markets, and festive atmosphere. Spring weather is generally pleasant, attracting many visitors.
Mid-April offers comfortable weather for vineyard walks and river cruises. Crowds moderate as tourist season ramps up.
Late April is ideal for outdoor dining and visiting historic sites with mild weather and blooming nature. Increasing tourist numbers but still manageable.
Warm spring weather perfect for outdoor festivities, markets, and wine festivals. High visitor interest, lively atmosphere.
Consistently mild and pleasant weather; ideal for exploring vineyards, hiking, and city tours. Crowds increasing but still enjoyable.
Major local wine festival with tastings, music, and cultural events. Warm weather and vibrant crowds make this an excellent time to visit.
Late May offers warm temperatures and long days, perfect for river cruises and outdoor cafes. Moderate to high crowds but excellent travel conditions.
Early summer with warm, sunny weather ideal for outdoor sightseeing and wine tours. Crowds rise as tourist season peaks.
Warm temperatures with often sunny skies; ideal for river cruises on the Main and exploring vineyards. Busy but vibrant city life.

ranges.event: Mozart Festival Würzburg (late June start some years)
ranges.notes: Classical music festival attracts cultural tourists; warm weather continues, though crowds concentrate around festival venues.
Late June weather is warm and often humid; good for outdoor activities but some may find crowds and heat less comfortable.
High summer with warm to hot weather; outdoor sights popular but high crowds and prices may deter budget travelers.
July stays hot with occasional thunderstorms; great for river activities but urban sightseeing can be tiring in heat.
Mid-July heat peaks, sometimes uncomfortable; outdoor events prevail but some attractions may be crowded and expensive.
Late July can be hot and humid; good for river activities but some visitors may avoid city center due to crowds and heat.
August heat continues, sometimes oppressive; good for wine festivals but city can feel crowded and expensive.
Summer holiday period with high visitor numbers; hot weather favors river and vineyard visits but urban sightseeing less comfortable.
Mid-August remains hot, some rainy days possible; crowds remain high with peak summer tourists. Good for festive events but less for quiet exploration.
Late August sees gradual cooling and fewer crowds as summer holidays end; good balance of weather and visitor numbers.
Early September offers warm, pleasant weather and one of the city’s biggest wine festivals, drawing large but manageable crowds.
Mild weather with sunny days ideal for vineyard hiking and river cruises. Tourist numbers are high but not overwhelming.
Mid-September weather cools slightly but remains pleasant; fewer tourists as high season winds down, good for relaxed exploration.
Late September brings cooler weather and colorful foliage; excellent for outdoor walks and wine cellar visits with moderate crowds.
Early October harvest celebrations with local food and wine; crisp autumn weather ideal for scenic views and cultural visits.
Mid-October weather cools significantly with more rain; fewer tourists and quieter atmosphere but outdoor activities can be limited.
Cooler temps and occasional rain; good time for indoor cultural activities and wine cellar tours. Low tourist volumes and better prices.
Late October sees autumn leaves and crisp air; fewer outdoor options but good for quiet sightseeing and local gastronomy. Limited daylight hours.
Cold and often rainy with short days; low tourist activity. Good for museum visits but many outdoor attractions are less inviting.
Continued cold, grey weather; few tourists and some attractions may start winter closures. Quiet city with lower prices.
Religious holiday with local observances; cooler weather persists but indoor cultural experiences recommended.
Late November marks start of Christmas market setup; chilly but atmospheric evenings. Good for early holiday shopping and indoor events.
Festive market opens early December; cold weather but enchanting atmosphere with lights, crafts, and local food. Crowds grow closer to Christmas.
Mid-December continues festive spirit with markets and concerts; cold but magical. Good for cultural travelers and families.
Peak Christmas market days with festive concerts, cultural events, and joyful crowds; cold weather but warm atmosphere makes it excellent for holiday travelers.
Christmas Day is quiet with many closures; New Year's Eve has celebrations but cold and often snowy weather. Crowds fluctuate with holiday travelers.
